endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{accountName}/privateEndpointConnections
endpoints.description: List all private endpoint connections on a Cosmos DB account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{accountName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{accountName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{accountName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
